sglang.title: FlashInfer NVFP4 MoE with EP & 2-stream shared expert
sglang.author: trevor-m
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Integrates Flashinfer NVFP4 cutlass MoE kernel from flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#1113
You can enable it with --enable-flashinfer-moe. --enable-ep-moe is also supported for this backend.
Example usage
TP 8
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --model-path nvidia/DeepSeek-R1-FP4 --trust-remote-code

sglang.title: [misc] Add PD service discovery support in router
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add Kubernetes service discovery for PD (Prefill-Decode) disaggregated routing with unified event handling and automatic pod classification.
Modifications
Implementation

Core Architecture: Unified pod event handler supports both regular and PD modes. Pod type detection via Kubernetes lab

vllm.title: [Misc] Simplify vllm bench cli subcommand implementation
vllm.author: yeqcharlotte
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
I found the existing implementation over-complicated:

every module has to include cmd_init();
bench base subcommand has to keep track of a BENCHMARK_CMD_MODULES and iterate over it manually;

BENCHMARK_CMD_MODULES = [
    vllm.entrypoints.cli.benchmark.latency,
    vllm.entrypoints.cli.benc

vllm.title: [Chore] dedup logs
vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR dedups triton logs given that we are already warning about this during eager import check.
Also moves the custom all-reduce warning to debug, given that this is not useful for end-users (only for debugging purposes here.)
Signed-off-by: Aaron Pham contact@aarnphm.xyz

vllm.title: [BugFix] Add an env to disable moe chunking to work around compile incompatibility
vllm.author: yeqcharlotte
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Temp workaround for IMA under high max num batched tokens: #19631
Due to compile incompatibility I feel we shouldn't turn this on by default until we have more comprehensive tests but I'm also open to other options. cc: @zou3519 @bnellnm
Test Plan
Turn off chunking w/ inductor:
VLLM_ENABLE_F

vllm.title: [Perf][CLI] Improve overall startup time
vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR performs lazy loading for importing vllm, where it tries to cleanup a lot of eager heavy imports to help improve general CLI startup experience
This PR does:

Lazy load imports vllm/__init__.py to avoid unwanted side-effect. I have checked that most of these imports will be run during serve/

vllm.title: [Core] feat: Implement Priority Scheduling in V1 Engine
vllm.author: amitm02
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This commit introduces priority scheduling capabilities to the V1 LLM engine.
Key changes include:
EngineCoreRequest and Request updates:
Added a priority field to EngineCoreRequest and Request classes to carry priority information.
Processor update:
Modified Processor.process_inputs to accept and p

vllm.title: [Misc] Configurable timeout for execute_model RPC calls via env var
vllm.author: jinqinn
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR introduces a configurable timeout for execute_model RPC calls in the multiprocessing executor by adding the VLLM_EXECUTE_MODEL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS environment variable.

vllm.title: Fix(models/siglip): Add compatibility for Gemma models quantized by llm-compressor
vllm.author: Flink-ddd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This PR resolves a KeyError that occurs when attempting to serve a Gemma-3 model that has been quantized by the vllm-project/llm-compressor library. It makes the SigLIP vision model loader more robust to variations in weight naming conventions.
This directly addresses the root cause of t
